name: Adobe Experience Cloud Offer
description: A personalized offer used in Adobe Journey Optimizer and Target for delivering tailored content to customers based on eligibility rules, priority, and placement configuration.

offerId.description: The unique identifier for the offer.

name.description: The human-readable name of the offer.

description.description: A description of the offer content and purpose.

status.description: The lifecycle status of the offer.

offerType.description: Whether this is a personalized or fallback offer.

representations.description: The content representations for different channels and placements.

channel.description: The delivery channel (web, email, mobile, etc.).

placementId.description: The placement where this representation can be displayed.

content.description: The content payload (HTML, JSON, text, or image URL).

contentType.description: The MIME type of the content.

eligibilityRule.description: The eligibility rule defining which profiles can receive this offer.

priority.description: The priority ranking when multiple offers are eligible.

maxImpressions.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown.

scope.description: Whether capping applies globally or per profile.

startDate.description: When the offer becomes eligible for delivery.

endDate.description: When the offer is no longer eligible for delivery.

tags.description: Tags for categorizing offers into collections.

lastModified.description: When the offer was last modified.
